\usepackage{geometry}
\geometry{a4paper, margin=2.2cm}

\usepackage{fontspec}
\setmainfont{DejaVu Serif}
\setsansfont{DejaVu Sans}

\usepackage{xcolor}
\definecolor{ws-gold}{HTML}{C9A227}

\usepackage{titlesec}
\titleformat{\section}{\Large\bfseries\color{black}}{\thesection}{1em}{}
\titleformat{\subsection}{\large\bfseries\color{black!80}}{\thesubsection}{1em}{}

\usepackage{fancyhdr}
\pagestyle{fancy}
\fancyhf{}
\renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{1.2pt}
\renewcommand{\headrule}{\hbox to\headwidth{\color{ws-gold}\leaders\hrule height 1.2pt\hfill}}
\fancyhead[L]{\small\textcolor{black}{Worshipping Sekhmet}}
\fancyhead[R]{\footnotesize\textcolor{black!70}{Document}}
\fancyfoot[C]{\thepage}
